x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: A tool for creating a dependency diagram of the projects within a solution.

options.name: --solution
options.description: The solution file to generate the project dependency diagram from.

options.name: --options-file
options.description: The options file to load the project dependency diagram options from.

options.name: --output-filename
options.description: The output filename. Defaults to the name of the solution.

options.name: --include-packages
options.description: Include package dependencies in the diagram.

options.name: --include-test-projects
options.description: Include test projects (projects that reference NUnit, MSTest, xUnit or MbUnit).

options.name: --ignore
options.description: Ignore a specific project or package.

options.name: --style
options.description: Sets the style of the dependency diagram.

options.name: --size
options.description: Sets the size of the dependency diagram.

options.name: --direction
options.description: Sets the direction of the dependency diagram.

options.name: --color-modern
options.description: Color projects targeting modern frameworks (net5.0, netcore, netstandard).

options.name: --show-targets
options.description: Show the target frameworks for each project.

options.name: --image-type
options.description: Sets the image type of the dependency diagram.

options.name: --open-diagram
options.description: Open the dependency diagram after generation.

options.name: --output-yuml
options.description: Saves the yuml for the dependency diagram to a file.
